description: Product Description pretty cotton roll 100g Directions 1. Wet the cotton pad with your chosen makeup remover or cleanser. 2. Gently rub the pad over your skin in circular motions to remove makeup. 3. Rinse your face with water and follow with your regular skincare routine. 4. Dispose of the used cotton pad responsibly.
